pet_notes: Compact rainbow flame droplet mascot with a soft painterly gradient body, yellow-orange flame tip, magenta-to-blue-to-green lower body bands, two simple white circular eyes, and a tiny golden orb antenna curling above the head; no mouth, no text, no props, centered full body, crisp silhouette.
style_notes: Preserve the reference icon's soft painterly rainbow flame look while keeping every pose readable at pet size.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `auto`: Infer the most appropriate pet-safe style from the user request and reference images, then keep that exact style consistent across every row. User style notes: Preserve the reference icon's soft painterly rainbow flame look while keeping every pose readable at pet size..
